# Master Context

This is a navigation alias for an existing project adopted into Product Factory OS. Do not duplicate project context here.

## Canonical Sources

- Project-local operating rules: `AGENTS.md`
- Agent-facing runtime rules: `CODEX.md`
- Session memory: `.codex-memory/MEMORY.md`
- Reloadable state: `.codex-memory/STATE.json`
- PFO runtime contracts: `.pfo/`

## Rule

Update the canonical sources first. Keep this file as a short index only.
